entities.shopkeeper: a friendly shopkeeper in an apron

scenes.title: The Pet Shop
scenes.background_prompt: A cozy pet shop interior with a long wooden shelf along the back wall, a glass counter with a cash register, a fishbowl on the counter, and a tall perch stand. Warm lighting. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cozy pet shop with warm lighting. Three identical orange tabby kittens sit in a neat row on a wooden shelf along the back wall, each in a slightly different pose — the left one licking its paw, the middle one sitting upright with wide eyes, and the right one curled with its tail wrapped around its body. A colorful parrot with green, red, and yellow feathers perches on a tall wooden stand to the right of the shelf, tilting its head. A round glass fishbowl sits on the glass counter in the foreground, containing a small orange goldfish and a tiny castle decoration. A friendly shopkeeper in a brown apron and white shirt stands behind the counter near the cash register, smiling. The walls are lined with shelves of pet supplies — bags of food, leashes, and small toys.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place kitten_1 on the wooden shelf (left), sitting and licking its paw. Place kitten_2 on the shelf (center), sitting upright with wide eyes. Place kitten_3 on the shelf (right), curled with tail wrapped around body. Place parrot on the tall wooden stand (far right), tilting head. Place shopkeeper behind the glass counter, standing and smiling.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, two small green bushes sit in grey pots on a polished wooden floor. To their right, a larger green bush in a brown pot stands against the left wall. The left wall is green and features a framed picture and a string of glowing yellow lights. Dominating the center and left midground is a large brown wooden shelving unit. On the top shelf, from left to right, are two potted plants, a blue rectangular box, three green bags of pet food, two yellow bags, several small colorful blocks, a white toy, and three more bags of pet food in green and blue. Below this, on the middle shelf, are four boxes of pet food in yellow, blue, pink, and green. Next to them, kitten_1, an orange tabby, sits on a stack of blue and purple blankets and licks its paw. To the right of kitten_1, kitten_2, another orange tabby, sits upright on a stack of blue blankets. Further right on the same shelf are a white bone toy, two ball toys, kitten_3, a third orange tabby lying down, and a pink bag. The bottom shelf contains three blue bags of pet food, several boxes, and more blankets. The base of the unit has two large drawers with gold knobs. In the right midground, a curved glass counter with a brown base holds a grey cash register and a round fishbowl containing a small orange goldfish and a miniature castle. Behind the counter stands the shopkeeper, a woman with brown curly hair wearing a green headscarf, a green and white striped shirt, and a yellow apron with a green heart. To her right, a parrot with green, yellow, and blue feathers perches on a multi-branched wooden stand. The back wall is yellow, decorated with more string lights and several potted plants on top of the shelving unit. A round green plant hangs from the ceiling above the shopkeeper. The right wall is green and also features string lights. The overall scene is a brightly lit, cozy pet shop during the day.
